zh.lifeSummary: 當Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn於1277年出生時，他的父親Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn20歲，母親Egidia Agnes Comyn33歲。他於大約1300年與Johanna結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1312年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1329年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn于1277年出生时，他的父亲Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn20岁，母亲Egidia Agnes Comyn33岁。他于大约1300年与Johanna结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1312年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1329年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Salvatore, Gaetano, Angelo, Antonio, Domenic, Sal, Aniello, Attilio, Carlo, Carmela, Concetta.
Italian (Sicily and Naples): perhaps from Arabickhalīṣ ‘pure, sincere’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn was born in 1277, his father, Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn, was 20 and his mother, Egidia Agnes Comyn, was 33. He married Johanna about 1300. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1312. He died about 1329, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn est né en 1277, son père, Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Egidia Agnes Comyn, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Johanna environ 1300. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1312. Il est décédé environ 1329, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn 1277 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn 20 und seine Mutter Egidia Agnes Comyn 33. Er hat um 1300 Johanna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1312 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1329 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn è nato il nel 1277, il suo padre, Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Egidia Agnes Comyn, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Johanna circa 1300. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1312. Morì circa 1329, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearnが1277年に生まれた時，父Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearnは20歳，母Egidia Agnes Comynは33歳であった。約1300年にJohannaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1329年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn(이)가 1277년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Egidia Agnes Comyn(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 Johanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1329년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn nasceu em 1277, seu pai, Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Agnes Comyn, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna aproximadamente 1300. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1312. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1329, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn родился в 1277 г., его отцу по имени Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Agnes Comyn, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna около 1300 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1312 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1329 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malise IV 7th Earl of Stathearn nació en 1277, su papá, Malise III 6th Earl of Strathearn, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Egidia Agnes Comyn, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Johanna aproximadamente 1300. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1312. Murió aproximadamente 1329, a la edad de 53 años.
